content.en:
Compared to the Ancient Technique, the Infinite Divine Power Technique is simply rubbish!

"If you can practice one more ancient technique, I'm afraid your strength will be even stronger!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

If the other Blood Transformation Realm creatures knew that Ye Tian had cultivated an ancient technique, they would still be satisfied, I am afraid that they would die of jealousy!

Moreover, he was now only three Blood Transformation Realms, which was enough to match the top five Blood Transformation Realms, and if he cultivated to break through again and reach four Blood Transformation Realms, he would be able to match the top six Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

"Ancient Golden Blood is a good thing, if you get other Ancient Techniques in the future, you have to find a way to get more Ancient Golden Blood. "

It's a pity that he doesn't have much Ancient Golden Blood left now, and it's not enough to practice the second Ancient Technique.

Of course, when his strength grows stronger and stronger, there will definitely be more chances to obtain the primeval golden blood.

"The next goal is to break through the cultivation to the fourth Blood Transformation Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

But it is not easy to break through to the four blood transformation realms, not to mention that he has also practiced the ancient technique, and his physical body has become more terrifying, and it is naturally more difficult to transform his heart.

Treasures like Dragon Gold Blood were of no use to him now.

......

White Elephant City.

Ye Tian came to the shop of the White Dragon Clan again, ready to sell some items, these items were all items he found in the ancient ruins, which could be sold for hundreds of thousands of white elephant gold.

Soon, he completed the transaction with the shop and obtained hundreds of thousands of white elephant gold.

Afterwards, he asked, "Do you have a better resource in your shop than Dragon Gold Blood, which is suitable for cultivators?" "

"Not really!" Bai Long shook his head, "There are not many resources suitable for cultivators, most of the resources sold in these shops in White Elephant City are the resources needed by the Territorial Sea Realm Seam Blood Transformation Realm Race, and the resources that are useful to cultivators are very few, because even if you get a lot of them, they can't sell them all!"

"Do you know where it is?"

Ye Tian asked.

This white dragon saw that Ye Tian often came to the store to trade, so he told Ye Tian.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, if you want to obtain the Golden Blood of the Dragon, it is a resource for your cultivators, I suggest that you shuttle all the way from the direction of the White Elephant City and go directly to the Cosmos City!"

"Universal City!"

Ye Tian was taken aback.

What does the word Huanyu have to do with the Huanyu Tower?

However, he didn't ask, but simply asked about the situation in Huanyu City.

"What kind of place is Huanyu City, why haven't I heard of it?" Ye Tian asked.

Bai Long introduced: "Cosmos City is the strength established by your cultivators, and there are also a few Blood Transformation Realm races that will enter Cosmos City to trade. For example, our White Dragon clan has also been there. In the White Elephant City, there are very few Blood Transformation Realm creatures who know about Cosmos City, and I only heard the elders mention it by chance. Of course, more information, I don't know. I only know that Huanyu City is very powerful, and it seems to be more powerful than White Elephant City, but it is not clear whether it is true or not. "

"Thank you!"

Ye Tian said gratefully.

Then, he left the White Elephant City and headed for the Cosmos City.

......

I have to say that the White Elephant City is really far away from Huanyu City, and with his current speed, he can far surpass his previous self, and he has been traveling for a long time before he arrives in Huanyu City.

"This is it!"

In this area of the boundary of territorial waters, the number of cultivators has increased, but the number of Blood Transformation Realm creatures has decreased, and occasionally they are seen in groups, and they will not attack cultivators.

After all, this is the territory of cultivators, and where do these Blood Transformation Realm creatures dare to attack cultivators, they are worried that cultivators will attack them, so they rush with a united team.

When Ye Tian saw Huanyu City, he immediately sensed that the Huanyu Order in his body was shaking.

When he learned the name Huanyu City, he specially brought the Huanyu Ling, and now it seems that the Huanyu Ling really has something to do with Huanyu City.

Ye Tian walked into Huanyu City and saw a lot of cultivators, there were ordinary Heavenly Ancestors, there were also Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, and there were also four or five Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, and he could vaguely sense the existence of more than six Blood Transformation Realms.

Moreover, Huanyu City is larger than White Elephant City.

Moreover, there is an unimaginable large array in Huanyu City, suppressing the strength of many Heavenly Ancestors, so that Heavenly Ancestors cannot cause much damage in Huanyu City.

Once a Heavenly Ancestor makes trouble in Huanyu City, it will definitely be suppressed in an instant.

Subsequently, Ye Tian inquired about the news in Huanyu City to understand the situation here.

After a period of time, Ye Tian had a general understanding of the basic situation of Huanyu City.

Huanyu City is located in the middle of multiple territorial waters, and these territorial waters are very powerful, but they are not as weak as Wanlong's territorial waters.

Huanyu City can be said to be the center of exchange and trading between these territorial waters, after all, entering other territorial waters, the strength will be suppressed, and many Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors will naturally not easily step into other territorial waters.

That's why Huanyu City is so prosperous.

In addition, there is a Cosmos Tower in the Cosmos City, with a total of eighteen floors.

He was quite surprised to learn that there was also a Cosmos Tower in Huanyu City, and he also understood that the real Huanyu Order should have something to do with this Huanyu Tower.

As for the origin of the Cosmos Tower, many Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors didn't know, they only knew that it had been here before the endless years, and it might even be longer than the years of existence of Cosmos City.

And if you want to enter the Cosmos Tower, you need the Cosmos Order, otherwise you won't be able to enter.

The number of Cosmos Orders is very scarce, and many forces are buying Cosmos Orders.

According to the price of Huanyu City, a Huanyu Order can be sold for 30,000 Taikoo Gold.

Ancient Gold is the currency of the Universal City, a currency that is recognized by all cultivators, and it can be circulated wherever it goes.

Of course, White Elephant Gold can also be exchanged for Taikoo Gold, and one Taikoo Gold can be exchanged for six White Elephant Gold.

In other words, the price of a Cosmos Order is 180,000 White Elephant Gold.

"The value of a Universal Order is so high!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

However, it is impossible for him to sell.

Subsequently. He came to the Cosmos Tower, ready to break into the Cosmos Tower.

When Ye Tian took out the Cosmos Order, he easily entered the Cosmos Tower.

"Detected that the master of the Cosmos Order has the authority of the sixth layer, you can go directly to the seventh layer, do you want to go to the seventh layer?"

This is supposed to be the Instrument Spirit of the Cosmos Tower.

"The information that I crossed the sixth layer in the Wanlong territorial waters should be stored in this Cosmos Order, and now the real Cosmos Tower knows about it. "

Ye Tian then directly entered the seventh layer of the Cosmos Tower.
